steps.title: Translate the question to a formula
steps.content: To find what percentage of 300 is 75, we set up: $$percentage = \frac{75}{300} \times 100$$

steps.title: Simplify the fraction and compute
steps.content: Simplify $\frac{75}{300}$ by dividing both by 75 to get $\frac{1}{4}$. Then: $$\frac{1}{4} \times 100 = 25\%$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
